str_AvatarDescriptor_ContentIDText: A content ID is the globally unique identifier of an asset. If the ID is disclosed, other users can obtain and use your asset without your consent under certain conditions. The SDK hides your content ID by default and allows a quick copy of the ID. If you need to show the content ID, please make sure your information is secure. For more information on content ID, tap here to read our official documentation.

str_CheckDetailWorldWindow_Text12: Due to the current platform limitations, using dynamic reflection probes on the Avatar is prohibited to ensure the user's experience.

str_CheckDetailWorldWindow_Text14: The current layer is official reserved.

str_ReCheck_01A:
Shader is missing.
Some objects have lost the shader and used InternalErrorShader. If you did not do this on purpose, check for errors in the scene.
str_ReCheck_01B:
Unofficial shader has been used.
Avatars can only use shaders on the allowlist. Please try to edit the material.
To view all shaders on the allowlist, click here.
str_ReCheck_01C:
The Avatar has used too many shaders.
An Avatar can use no more than 5 shaders. Please edit the materials and try again.
str_ReCheck_02A:
The Avatar has used too many materials.
An Avatar can use no more than 20 materials. Please try to reduce the amounts of materials.
str_ReCheck_03A:
The Avatar has too many triangles.
The current Avatar has over 60,000 triangles and will be automatically optimized by the platform.
Attention：In the game, the Avatar with a large number of triangles is displayed when the distance is close, and the number of triangles decreases as the distance increases.
str_ReCheck_03B:
The Avatar has too many triangles.
An Avatar can have no more than 700,000 triangles.
str_ReCheck_04A: The texture size is too large. The total size of the texture for an Avatar is not recommended to exceed 16MB. When exceeded, we will automatically compress the texture.
str_ReCheck_04B: The texture size is too large. The total size of the texture for an Avatar can no larger than 70MB.
str_ReCheck_05A: The texture amount has exceeded the upper limit. An Avatar can use no more than 10 textures.
str_ReCheck_06A:
The sub-meshes amount has exceeded the upper limit.
An Avatar can use no more than 20 sub-meshes.
str_ReCheck_07A:
The Avatar has used too many post-processing effects.
An Avatar can use only 1 post-processing effect.
str_ReCheck_08A:
The Avatar has used too many dynamic lights.
An Avatar can use only 1 dynamic light. Extra lights will be deleted automatically.
Attention: Tthe actual running effect may be different from the expectation.
str_ReCheck_09A:
The Avatar has used dynamic reflection probe.
Avatars cannot use dynamic reflection probes.
str_ReCheck_10A:
The Avatar has too many bones.
An Avatar can use no more than 150 bones.
str_ReCheck_11A: Due to the current platform limitations, we've limited the maximum number of bones allowed in the Avatar to 32 to ensure the user's experience. It will be deleted automatically once exceeded.
str_ReCheck_12A:
The Avatar has used too many physical bone collisions.
The total number of physical bone collisions can no greater than 32. It will be automatically deleted if it is exceeded.
str_ReCheck_13A:
The Avatar has used too many particle emitters.
An Avatar can use no more than 5 particle emitters.
str_ReCheck_14A:
The particles amount has exceeded the upper limit.
The maximum number of particles emitted simultaneously cannot exceed 20.
str_ReCheck_15A:
Mesh particles are not allowed to use.
Particle emitters are not allowed to emit mesh particles.
str_ReCheck_16A:
The Avatar size is too large.
The total resource size of the Avatar can no greater than 100MB.
str_ReCheck_19B: Invalid script detected. Please check your script content.
str_ReCheck_Text01: Multiple Avatars detected. Select one and move on to the next step
str_ReCheck_title: Due to the current limitations of platform performance, you will need to implement some optimizations for a better user experience:
